summary: Iteration 41: Tested TopBar UI refinements - stacked Customer/Opportunity, Target Solutions label, 5fr/5fr/3fr/3fr grid layout, grid-cols-3 DC/Site pills. ALL 9 TESTS PASSED.
passed_tests: 1. Customer/Opportunity stacked: Both inputs vertically stacked inside single pill container (flex-col gap-0.5 rounded-xl) - PASS
2. Target Solutions label: Shows 'Target Solutions' with Target icon, not 'Deployment' - PASS
3. Add DC: dc-name-input='DC1', dc-kw-input='500', dc-add-btn click → pill appeared in grid - PASS
4. Multiple DCs (grid-cols-3): Added 4 DCs, verified grid-cols-3 layout expands to 2 rows - PASS
5. Add Site: site-name-input='Site1', site-kw-input='300', site-add-btn click → pill appeared - PASS
6. Deployment toggles: All feature-* keys found (toggle-feature-nios, toggle-feature-uddi, toggle-feature-security, toggle-feature-asset, toggle-hybrid) and state changes correctly - PASS
7. IP Calculator: kw-input, multiplier-up/down arrows, multiplier-input all working (2.5→3→2.5) - PASS
8. Collapsible TopBar: Click header row collapses inputs (dc-name-input hidden), expands on click - PASS
9. Delete DC/Site: X buttons on pills remove them correctly - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: TopBar.jsx grid uses inline style gridTemplateColumns: '5fr 5fr 3fr 3fr' - correctly implemented
Computed widths: DC/Sites=505px each (5fr), Target Solutions/Active IPs=303px each (3fr) - equal width verified
Customer/Opportunity stacked in single pill with flex-col gap-0.5 rounded-xl bg-[#2c2c2e] - correctly positioned
DC/Site pills use grid grid-cols-3 gap-1.5 mb-2 - expands naturally without scroll
All toggles use feature-* keys: feature-nios, feature-uddi, feature-security, feature-asset insights
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI refinements verified working. Key layout changes: (1) Customer/Opportunity stacked vertically in single pill container, (2) Label changed from 'Deployment' to 'Target Solutions', (3) Grid layout: 5fr 5fr 3fr 3fr giving DC/Sites larger columns (505px) and Target Solutions/Active IPs equal smaller columns (303px), (4) DC/Site pills use grid-cols-3 that expands naturally into multiple rows, (5) All toggles use feature-* keys.

stacked_customer_opportunity.container_classes: flex flex-col gap-0.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-xl bg-[#2c2c2e] border border-[#3c3c3e]
stacked_customer_opportunity.layout: Customer input on top, Opportunity input below in same pill

dc_site_pills_grid.behavior: Expands naturally into multiple rows, no horizontal scroll
